tr.td: Carbon dioxide [Partial pressure] in Arterial blood
Carbon dioxide [Partial pressure] in Venous blood
Carbon dioxide, total [Moles/volume] in Venous blood
Activated clotting time (ACT) of Blood by Coagulation assay

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The main abnormality is arterial acidemia (low arterial pH), with normal pCO₂ and bicarbonate, suggesting a primary metabolic acidosis or mixed acid-base disorder. Venous total CO₂ is markedly low, supporting metabolic acidosis. Oxygenation and coagulation are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation for causes of metabolic acidosis.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale

tr.td: Activated clotting time (ACT) of Blood by Coagulation assay
